Class Performance

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.history.Event
org.jscience.social.arts.Performance
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Event>, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named, Temporal<TimeCoordinate>
public class Performance extends Event
A Live Performance of an Artwork. (e.g., play, concert, screening). Represents a specific event where an artwork is "performed".
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
